name: Perforce Integration
description: Perforce (P4) workspace management inside DevKit — multi-server, pending changelists, sync, submit, revert, shelve and workflow steps.
long_description: Adds a Perforce tab to DevKit with support for multiple server configurations (P4PORT/P4USER/P4CLIENT/P4PASSWD per workspace), opened-file tracking, pending and submitted changelist browsing, selective sync by path or changelist, submit with description, revert, and shelve/unshelve. Also registers p4_sync, p4_submit, and p4_revert_unchanged workflow step types.
author: HaloForge Team

p4_executable.title: P4 executable path
p4_executable.description: Override the p4 executable path (leave empty to use system PATH)

sync_parallel_threads.title: Parallel sync threads
sync_parallel_threads.description: Number of parallel threads for p4 sync (0 = server default)

commands.description: Add or update a workspace configuration
Test connection and fetch P4 info for a workspace
List files currently opened for edit/add/delete
Sync workspace (full, by path, or to a changelist)
Revert opened files (all or specific files)
Revert files that have not been modified (p4 revert -a)
Shelve files in a pending changelist
Unshelve files from a shelved changelist
Show unified diff of all opened files
